name: anti_zeno_upper_crossover
app_r_label: Bare Misra-Sudarshan anti-Zeno crossover nu* ~ 9 GHz (App X Sec X.12 / Ch13 Sec 13.4.6)
formula: nu* = T2 / tau_Z^2 with T2=10 us and tau_Z=1/(30 MHz)
tier: Tier 2 qualitative sign test; Tier 3 protected-subspace operating value
app_r_precision_str: Bare Misra-Sudarshan crossover nu*=9000.0 MHz; nu_c / nu*=0.0124. The registered A-Prime window is inverse-Zeno; positive nu_c T2 enhancement is O.23 protected-subspace-conditional.

extra.derivation_note: The registered observable is qualitative: the nu_c window should lengthen T2 relative to the low-frequency control only if O.23 supplies a protected subspace with reduced effective Hamiltonian variance.
